title: Exam Layout Template
description: Defines the physical layout of an exam answer sheet for CV-based extraction. All coordinates are in pixels at the reference DPI. The runtime scales proportionally if the actual scan DPI differs.

name.description: Human-readable name shown in UI. e.g. 'SEAMO 2025 Paper A - Lower Primary'

year.description: Exam year. Used for grouping, not matching.

paper.description: Paper identifier within the brand/year. e.g. 'K', 'A', 'B'

variant_of.description: If this layout is identical to another except for header text (paper letter, level name), reference the base template ID here. Only 'name', 'paper', and 'header.static_text' differ; all coordinates are inherited. Avoids duplicating geometry for SEAMO X 2026 C/D/E/F which share the same grid.

reference_dpi.description: DPI at which all pixel coordinates were measured. Typically 300.

page_size.description: Expected page dimensions at reference DPI. Used for sanity checking and scale detection.

anchor.description: A visually distinctive region used for template-matching alignment. Cropped from the reference image and matched via cv2.matchTemplate on each scanned page to compute dx/dy offset. Pick a region that is: (1) unique to this layout, (2) high-contrast, (3) stable across print runs.

min_match_score.description: Minimum cv2.matchTemplate correlation (TM_CCOEFF_NORMED) to accept a match. Below this, the page is rejected as not matching this layout.

detection.description: Optional hints for auto-detecting which template to use, checked before the expensive anchor template-match. All fields are optional; more fields = faster rejection of non-matching pages.

filename_pattern.description: Regex matched against the upload filename. e.g. 'SEAMO.*2025' or 'UZ'

text_markers.description: Strings expected to appear in OCR text of the page header region. All must match. e.g. ['SEAMO X', '2026', 'Paper K']

logo_anchor.description: A secondary anchor specifically for the logo/brand region, used for quick brand detection before full anchor matching.

header.description: Header region containing candidate info. Extracted via OCR or LLM.

region.description: Bounding box of the entire header area (relative to anchor-aligned coordinates).

fields.description: Header fields to extract, in order.

key.description: Machine key stored in DB. e.g. 'candidate_name', 'candidate_number', 'country'

label.description: Label as printed on the sheet. e.g. 'Candidate Name'

type.description: text_line: handwritten on a line. grid_boxes: one char per printed box (like CAN___). qr_code: scan a QR code.

region.description: Optional sub-region for this specific field. If omitted, the whole header region is sent to LLM.

prefix.description: Fixed prefix printed in the grid boxes. e.g. 'CAN' for candidate number.

max_length.description: Maximum characters expected. e.g. 12 for candidate number grid.

sections.description: Answer sections in reading order (top-to-bottom, left-to-right). Each section is an independent extraction unit with its own strategy.

type.description: mcq_grid: shade-one-bubble MCQ. numeric_grid: one-char-per-cell written answers. open_response: free-form handwritten box. diagram: drawing/visual answer.

questions.description: Question range covered by this section.

region.description: Bounding box of the entire section (for cropping before extraction).

grid.description: Grid geometry. Required for mcq_grid and numeric_grid types.

rows.description: Number of question rows in this section.

cols.description: Number of visual columns of questions. e.g. 2 for a 10+5 split layout, 1 for a single column of 20.

questions_per_col.description: How many questions per visual column. e.g. [10, 5] for a 15-question 2-column layout. Sum must equal total questions.

options.description: Option labels in order. e.g. ['A','B','C'] or ['A','B','C','D','E'].

cells_per_question.description: For numeric_grid: number of character cells per question. e.g. 7

row_positions.description: Y-coordinate of each question row (relative to section region top). If omitted, computed from row_pitch.

col_positions.description: X-coordinate of each option column (for mcq_grid) or each cell (for numeric_grid), relative to section region left.

row_pitch.description: Vertical spacing between row centers. Used if row_positions is omitted.

col_pitch.description: Horizontal spacing between option/cell centers. Used if col_positions is omitted.

cell_width.description: Width of one bubble/cell in pixels.

cell_height.description: Height of one bubble/cell in pixels.

bubble_height.description: For mcq_grid: the actual ink-sensitive region height within a cell (may be smaller than cell_height). Maps to current bubble_h.

first_row_offset.description: Y offset from section top to the center of the first answer row.

question_overrides.description: Per-question overrides for mixed-format sections (e.g. Paper A 2026 where Q4 is a clock diagram but Q5 is a grid). Keys are question numbers as strings.

type.description: Override the section type for this specific question.

region.description: Custom bounding box for this question (relative to page, not section).

prompt_hint.description: For diagram type: hint to the LLM about what to extract. e.g. 'Read the time shown on the clock face' or 'Count the shaded sections of the pie chart'.

extraction_strategy.description: Preferred extraction method. cv: pixel ink scoring (MCQ bubbles). ocr: Tesseract per-cell. llm: send crop to Gemini. cv_then_llm: try CV first, fall back to LLM on low confidence.

scoring.description: Thresholds for CV-based MCQ extraction. Only relevant for mcq_grid type.

min_ink_pixels.description: Minimum ink pixel count to consider a bubble filled. Maps to current threshold of 35.

min_ratio.description: Minimum ratio of best-to-second-best score to accept a selection. Maps to current 1.12.

binary_threshold.description: Grayscale threshold for binary inversion. Maps to current 180.

min_page_coverage.description: Minimum fraction of questions resolved to accept the page. Maps to current 0.60.

min_avg_ratio.description: Minimum average best/second ratio across all rows. Maps to current 1.10.
